
```{r setup}
# devtools::install_github("samperochkin/hpoltest")
library("hpoltest")
library('data.table')
allData = readRDS('/store/patrick/copernicus/agg/indiaForCC.rds')
allData = as.data.table(allData)
allData = allData[!is.na(allData$ecoRegionInt), ]
allData$sqrtPm = sqrt(pmin(allData$pm,1000))
allData$timeIid = as.numeric(allData$date)
allData$tempClean = pmax(allData$tempd, -10)


cc_design <- ccDesign(strat_vars = c("cell","ecoRegionInt", "yearMonthDow") )


pmKnots = c(0, 1, 2, 5, 10, 20, 32) # on square root scale
tempKnots = c(-10, -5, 5, 10, 20, 25, 30)

formula <- count ~ #od(date) +
  hiwp(sqrtPm, p=2, ref_value = sqrt(25), knots = pmKnots, group_var = ecoRegionInt) +
  hiwp(tempClean, p=2, ref_value = 10, knots = tempKnots, group_var = ecoRegionInt)
```

```{r fit}
fit <- hnlm(formula, allData, cc_design = cc_design)
```


```{r res}
fit$obj$env$last.par.best[names(fit$obj$env$last.par.best) == "beta"]
#
fit$obj$env$last.par.best[names(fit$obj$env$last.par.best) == "theta"]
```



```{r resEffects}

newdata = data.frame(sqrtPm = seq(0, sqrt(400), len=200), ecoRegionInt = 18)


varInfo = do.call(rbind, lapply(fit$terms, function(xx) unlist(xx[c('var','type')])))
whichIsHiwp  = which(varInfo[,'type'] == 'hiwp')

whichIsGamma = which(names(fit$obj$env$last.par.best) == "gamma")
gammaHat = fit$obj$env$last.par.best[whichIsGamma]
varGammaHat = solve(fit$obj$env$spHess()[whichIsGamma, whichIsGamma])

gammaIndices = mapply(function(D, id) {which(id == D)}, 
                      D = Sid, MoreArgs = list(id = fit$gamma_info$id), SIMPLIFY=FALSE)
gammaIndices = unlist(gammaIndices)

gammaHatHere = gammaHat[gammaIndices]
varGammaHatHere = varGammaHat[gammaIndices, gammaIndices]

Sbeta = which(names(fit$obj$env$last.par.best) == "beta")


#ref_values = lapply(fit$terms[whichIsHiwp], function(xx) xx$ref_value)
#names(ref_values) = varInfo[whichIsHiwp, 'var']
#ranges = lapply(fit$terms[whichIsHiwp], function(xx) xx$range)
#names(ranges) = varInfo[whichIsHiwp, 'var']


Sterms = which(varInfo[,'var'] %in% names(newdata))
newDesignMat = hpoltest:::getNewXA(fit$terms[Sterms], newdata)

Sid = unlist(lapply(fit$terms[Sterms], function(xx) xx$id))


newdata$mean = drop(newDesignMat$A %*% gammaHatHere)
newdata$sd =sqrt(apply( (newDesignMat$A %*% varGammaHatHere) * newDesignMat$A, 1, sum))


ciMat = array(c(1, 0, 1, -1.95996398454005, 1, 1.95996398454005), dim = c(2,3), 
              dimnames = list(c("mean", "sd"), c("est", " 2.5", "97.5")))

matplot(
  newdata$sqrtPm^2,
  as.matrix(newdata[,c('mean','sd')]) %*% ciMat,
  type='l', lty=c(1,2,2), col='black'
)

```
